Title: Daily Sunblock
Condition: Collect sun_amount of sun during one day

Title: Chapter Hunter
Condition: Defeat 50 zombies from a chapter

Title: Pro Plant Player
Condition: Kill 10 zombies using only a specific plant

Title: Only Cactus
Condition: Kill 10 zombies using only Cactus

Title: Economical Herbivore
Condition: Win a level losing no more than n plants

Title: Defense Master
Condition: Finish a level with exactly 0 suns

Title: Quick Reaction
Condition: Kill 10 zombies in less than 30 seconds from the first wave

Title: Pro Demolition
Condition: Use 3 explosive plants in one level

Title: Symmetry
Condition: Garden must be symmetrical at the end

Title: Family Massacre
Condition: Use only family_type plants to kill zombies

Title: Flourish in Limits
Condition: Win without using any plant from family_type

Title: Night or Morning
Condition: Finish a day level with night plants (mushrooms)

Title: Win Streak
Condition: Win 5 levels in a row on highest difficulty

Title: Almost Won
Condition: Kill 10 zombies in the first column of a row without a lawnmower

Title: What OCD?
Condition: Win a level with completely asymmetrical garden (except middle row)

Title: Cloudy Day
Condition: Beat a level using only 3 sun-producing plants

Title: One Column Less
Condition: Win a level without planting in the nth column

Title: Defenseless Row
Condition: Win a level without planting in the nth row

Title: Defenseless Cross
Condition: Win a level with the nth row and column empty

Title: Lawnmower Time
Condition: Kill at least n zombies with lawnmowers
